failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the ElastiCache Replication Group is securely encrypted at transit and has auth token

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_elasticache_replication_group.main File: /elasticache/main.tf: 45-68 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/general-11
45 | resource "aws_elasticache_replication_group" "main" { 46 | replication_group_id = "${local.name_prefix}-redis" 47 | description = "Redis para Sistema de Reservas ${local.name_prefix}" 48 | node_type = var.node_type 49 | num_cache_clusters = 2 50 | automatic_failover_enabled = true 51 | engine = "redis" 52 | engine_version = var.redis_engine_version 53 | port = 6379 54 | subnet_group_name = aws_elasticache_subnet_group.main.name 55 | security_group_ids = [var.sg_elasticache_id] 56 | at_rest_encryption_enabled = true 57 | transit_encryption_enabled = true 58 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 59 | 60 | preferred_cache_cluster_azs = [ 61 | var.availability_zones[0], 62 | var.availability_zones[1] 63 | ] 64 | 65 | tags = { 66 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-redis" 67 | } 68 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_168] Ensure SQS queue policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it

failure.message: Ensure SQS queue policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_324] Ensure that RDS Cluster log capture is enabled

failure.message: Ensure that RDS Cluster log capture is enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_rds_cluster.main File: /rds/main.tf: 69-106 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-324
69 | resource "aws_rds_cluster" "main" { 70 | cluster_identifier = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-cluster" 71 | engine = "aurora-postgresql" 72 | engine_version = var.aurora_engine_version 73 | database_name = var.aurora_database_name 74 | port = var.aurora_port 75 | 76 | # Credenciales desde Secrets Manager 77 | master_username = "admin_${var.project_name}" 78 | master_password = var.db_master_password 79 | 80 | # Red 81 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.main.name 82 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.sg_rds_id] 83 | 84 | # Cifrado 85 | storage_encrypted = true 86 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 87 | 88 | # Backup automático nativo de Aurora 89 | backup_retention_period = var.backup_retention_days 90 | preferred_backup_window = var.backup_window 91 | 92 | # Mantenimiento 93 | preferred_maintenance_window = var.maintenance_window 94 | 95 | # Parámetros 96 | db_cluster_parameter_group_name = aws_rds_cluster_parameter_group.main.name 97 | 98 | # Protección contra eliminación accidental 99 | deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 100 | skip_final_snapshot = var.environment == "prod" ? false : true 101 | final_snapshot_identifier = var.environment == "prod" ? "${local.name_prefix}-final-snapshot" : null 102 | 103 | tags = { 104 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-cluster" 105 | } 106 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_162] Ensure RDS cluster has IAM authentication enabled

failure.message: Ensure RDS cluster has IAM authentication enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_rds_cluster.main File: /rds/main.tf: 69-106 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/ensure-rds-cluster-has-iam-authentication-enabled
69 | resource "aws_rds_cluster" "main" { 70 | cluster_identifier = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-cluster" 71 | engine = "aurora-postgresql" 72 | engine_version = var.aurora_engine_version 73 | database_name = var.aurora_database_name 74 | port = var.aurora_port 75 | 76 | # Credenciales desde Secrets Manager 77 | master_username = "admin_${var.project_name}" 78 | master_password = var.db_master_password 79 | 80 | # Red 81 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.main.name 82 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.sg_rds_id] 83 | 84 | # Cifrado 85 | storage_encrypted = true 86 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 87 | 88 | # Backup automático nativo de Aurora 89 | backup_retention_period = var.backup_retention_days 90 | preferred_backup_window = var.backup_window 91 | 92 | # Mantenimiento 93 | preferred_maintenance_window = var.maintenance_window 94 | 95 | # Parámetros 96 | db_cluster_parameter_group_name = aws_rds_cluster_parameter_group.main.name 97 | 98 | # Protección contra eliminación accidental 99 | deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 100 | skip_final_snapshot = var.environment == "prod" ? false : true 101 | final_snapshot_identifier = var.environment == "prod" ? "${local.name_prefix}-final-snapshot" : null 102 | 103 | tags = { 104 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-cluster" 105 | } 106 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_313] Ensure RDS cluster configured to copy tags to snapshots

failure.message: Ensure RDS cluster configured to copy tags to snapshots

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_rds_cluster.main File: /rds/main.tf: 69-106 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-313
69 | resource "aws_rds_cluster" "main" { 70 | cluster_identifier = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-cluster" 71 | engine = "aurora-postgresql" 72 | engine_version = var.aurora_engine_version 73 | database_name = var.aurora_database_name 74 | port = var.aurora_port 75 | 76 | # Credenciales desde Secrets Manager 77 | master_username = "admin_${var.project_name}" 78 | master_password = var.db_master_password 79 | 80 | # Red 81 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.main.name 82 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.sg_rds_id] 83 | 84 | # Cifrado 85 | storage_encrypted = true 86 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 87 | 88 | # Backup automático nativo de Aurora 89 | backup_retention_period = var.backup_retention_days 90 | preferred_backup_window = var.backup_window 91 | 92 | # Mantenimiento 93 | preferred_maintenance_window = var.maintenance_window 94 | 95 | # Parámetros 96 | db_cluster_parameter_group_name = aws_rds_cluster_parameter_group.main.name 97 | 98 | # Protección contra eliminación accidental 99 | deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 100 | skip_final_snapshot = var.environment == "prod" ? false : true 101 | final_snapshot_identifier = var.environment == "prod" ? "${local.name_prefix}-final-snapshot" : null 102 | 103 | tags = { 104 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-cluster" 105 | } 106 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_139] Ensure that RDS clusters have deletion protection enabled

failure.message: Ensure that RDS clusters have deletion protection enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_rds_cluster.main File: /rds/main.tf: 69-106 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-rds-clusters-and-instances-have-deletion-protection-enabled
69 | resource "aws_rds_cluster" "main" { 70 | cluster_identifier = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-cluster" 71 | engine = "aurora-postgresql" 72 | engine_version = var.aurora_engine_version 73 | database_name = var.aurora_database_name 74 | port = var.aurora_port 75 | 76 | # Credenciales desde Secrets Manager 77 | master_username = "admin_${var.project_name}" 78 | master_password = var.db_master_password 79 | 80 | # Red 81 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.main.name 82 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.sg_rds_id] 83 | 84 | # Cifrado 85 | storage_encrypted = true 86 | kms_key_id = var.kms_key_arn 87 | 88 | # Backup automático nativo de Aurora 89 | backup_retention_period = var.backup_retention_days 90 | preferred_backup_window = var.backup_window 91 | 92 | # Mantenimiento 93 | preferred_maintenance_window = var.maintenance_window 94 | 95 | # Parámetros 96 | db_cluster_parameter_group_name = aws_rds_cluster_parameter_group.main.name 97 | 98 | # Protección contra eliminación accidental 99 | deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 100 | skip_final_snapshot = var.environment == "prod" ? false : true 101 | final_snapshot_identifier = var.environment == "prod" ? "${local.name_prefix}-final-snapshot" : null 102 | 103 | tags = { 104 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-cluster" 105 | } 106 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_118] Ensure that enhanced monitoring is enabled for Amazon RDS instances

failure.message: Ensure that enhanced monitoring is enabled for Amazon RDS instances

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_rds_cluster_instance.primary File: /rds/main.tf: 111-127 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/ensure-that-enhanced-monitoring-is-enabled-for-amazon-rds-instances
111 | resource "aws_rds_cluster_instance" "primary" { 112 | identifier = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-primary" 113 | cluster_identifier = aws_rds_cluster.main.id 114 | instance_class = var.aurora_instance_class 115 | engine = aws_rds_cluster.main.engine 116 | engine_version = aws_rds_cluster.main.engine_version 117 | 118 | availability_zone = var.availability_zones[0] 119 | db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.main.name 120 | auto_minor_version_upgrade = true 121 | performance_insights_enabled = true 122 | 123 | tags = { 124 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-aurora-primary" 125 | Role = "primary" 126 | } 127 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_260] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80

failure.message: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.alb File: /security/main.tf: 116-148 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-aws-security-groups-do-not-allow-ingress-from-00000-to-port-80
116 | resource "aws_security_group" "alb" { 117 | name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-alb" 118 | description = "SG del Application Load Balancer — permite HTTPS desde internet" 119 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 120 | 121 | ingress { 122 | description = "HTTPS desde internet" 123 | from_port = 443 124 | to_port = 443 125 | protocol = "tcp" 126 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 127 | } 128 | 129 | ingress { 130 | description = "HTTP desde internet (redirect a HTTPS)" 131 | from_port = 80 132 | to_port = 80 133 | protocol = "tcp" 134 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 135 | } 136 | 137 | egress { 138 | description = "Hacia microservicios en subredes de app" 139 | from_port = 0 140 | to_port = 0 141 | protocol = "-1" 142 | cidr_blocks = [var.vpc_cidr] 143 | } 144 | 145 | tags = { 146 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-alb" 147 | } 148 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_130] Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

failure.message: Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_subnet.public[0] File: /vpc/main.tf: 65-77 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-vpc-subnets-do-not-assign-public-ip-by-default
65 | resource "aws_subnet" "public" { 66 | count = 2 67 | 68 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 69 | cidr_block = local.public_cidrs[count.index] 70 | availability_zone = local.azs[count.index] 71 | map_public_ip_on_launch = true 72 | 73 | tags = { 74 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-public-${local.azs[count.index]}" 75 | Tier = "public" 76 | } 77 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_130] Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

failure.message: Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_subnet.public[1] File: /vpc/main.tf: 65-77 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-vpc-subnets-do-not-assign-public-ip-by-default
65 | resource "aws_subnet" "public" { 66 | count = 2 67 | 68 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 69 | cidr_block = local.public_cidrs[count.index] 70 | availability_zone = local.azs[count.index] 71 | map_public_ip_on_launch = true 72 | 73 | tags = { 74 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-public-${local.azs[count.index]}" 75 | Tier = "public" 76 | } 77 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_11] Ensure VPC flow logging is enabled in all VPCs

failure.message: Ensure VPC flow logging is enabled in all VPCs

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

failure.message: Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.alb File: /security/main.tf: 116-148 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-that-security-groups-are-attached-to-ec2-instances-or-elastic-network-interfaces-enis
116 | resource "aws_security_group" "alb" { 117 | name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-alb" 118 | description = "SG del Application Load Balancer — permite HTTPS desde internet" 119 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 120 | 121 | ingress { 122 | description = "HTTPS desde internet" 123 | from_port = 443 124 | to_port = 443 125 | protocol = "tcp" 126 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 127 | } 128 | 129 | ingress { 130 | description = "HTTP desde internet (redirect a HTTPS)" 131 | from_port = 80 132 | to_port = 80 133 | protocol = "tcp" 134 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 135 | } 136 | 137 | egress { 138 | description = "Hacia microservicios en subredes de app" 139 | from_port = 0 140 | to_port = 0 141 | protocol = "-1" 142 | cidr_blocks = [var.vpc_cidr] 143 | } 144 | 145 | tags = { 146 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-alb" 147 | } 148 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

failure.message: Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.ecs File: /security/main.tf: 153-177 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-that-security-groups-are-attached-to-ec2-instances-or-elastic-network-interfaces-enis
153 | resource "aws_security_group" "ecs" { 154 | name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-ecs" 155 | description = "SG de los microservicios ECS — solo recibe tráfico desde el ALB" 156 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 157 | 158 | ingress { 159 | description = "Tráfico desde el ALB" 160 | from_port = 3000 161 | to_port = 3000 162 | protocol = "tcp" 163 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.alb.id] 164 | } 165 | 166 | egress { 167 | description = "Salida hacia VPC (RDS, ElastiCache, VPC Endpoints)" 168 | from_port = 0 169 | to_port = 0 170 | protocol = "-1" 171 | cidr_blocks = [var.vpc_cidr] 172 | } 173 | 174 | tags = { 175 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-ecs" 176 | } 177 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

failure.message: Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.rds File: /security/main.tf: 182-206 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-that-security-groups-are-attached-to-ec2-instances-or-elastic-network-interfaces-enis
182 | resource "aws_security_group" "rds" { 183 | name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-rds" 184 | description = "SG de Aurora PostgreSQL — solo acepta conexiones desde ECS" 185 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 186 | 187 | ingress { 188 | description = "PostgreSQL desde microservicios ECS" 189 | from_port = 5432 190 | to_port = 5432 191 | protocol = "tcp" 192 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.ecs.id] 193 | } 194 | 195 | egress { 196 | description = "Respuesta hacia ECS" 197 | from_port = 0 198 | to_port = 0 199 | protocol = "-1" 200 | cidr_blocks = [var.vpc_cidr] 201 | } 202 | 203 | tags = { 204 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-rds" 205 | } 206 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

failure.message: Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.elasticache File: /security/main.tf: 211-235 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-that-security-groups-are-attached-to-ec2-instances-or-elastic-network-interfaces-enis
211 | resource "aws_security_group" "elasticache" { 212 | name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-elasticache" 213 | description = "SG de ElastiCache Redis — solo acepta conexiones desde ECS" 214 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 215 | 216 | ingress { 217 | description = "Redis desde microservicios ECS" 218 | from_port = 6379 219 | to_port = 6379 220 | protocol = "tcp" 221 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.ecs.id] 222 | } 223 | 224 | egress { 225 | description = "Respuesta hacia ECS" 226 | from_port = 0 227 | to_port = 0 228 | protocol = "-1" 229 | cidr_blocks = [var.vpc_cidr] 230 | } 231 | 232 | tags = { 233 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-elasticache" 234 | } 235 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_57] Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

failure.message: Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_12] Ensure the default security group of every VPC restricts all traffic

failure.message: Ensure the default security group of every VPC restricts all traffic
